title: Environment-wide investigation sweep
description: Exercises `log10x_investigate` on the broadest path — `starting_point: 'environment'` — which scans every service for drift / acute-spike candidates. Test enforces (1) investigate runs and produces a coherent report (or a truthful 'no significant movement' negative result), (2) the chain emits at least one downstream NEXT_ACTIONS hint (drilldown into a specific service or pattern). Catches regressions in the environment-mode resolver and the empty-result NEXT_ACTIONS emission.
prompt: Anything weird going on across the whole environment in the last hour? If so, dig in.

initial_tool.reason: Environment-wide sweep is the canonical entry point for 'is anything weird?' on the demo env.

ground_truth.description: investigate produces a coherent report — either a result body, a 'no significant movement' negative, or an honest empty-environment marker
